title: ferray-io: load structured dtype .npy into FerrayRecord arrays
description: Follow-up from #735. Parser now recognises numpy structured dtype descriptors and emits a clear diagnostic. Loading them needs FerrayRecord scaffolding: build &'static [FieldDescriptor] from the parsed (name, dtype) pairs at runtime (Box::leak), wire DType::Struct + the existing element-type machinery, and populate Array<MyRecord, _> via per-field byte unpacks. Saving the inverse direction is similarly stub-only today.
